author: y4rr
content:
Result: Sprint C.7 complete.

Delivered:
- ferrotorch-mps/src/kernels/ — 6 .metal source files + mod.rs (10 kernel functions: matmul_f32, bmm_f32, add_f32, sub_f32, mul_f32, div_f32, relu_f32, sigmoid_f32, softmax_f32, sum_axis_f32)
- ferrotorch-mps/src/backend.rs — MtlBackend struct implementing GpuBackend trait (cfg(target_os='macos')), with cpu_to_gpu/gpu_to_cpu/clone_buffer/alloc_zeros lifecycle + all 10 kernel dispatch methods
- ferrotorch-mps/src/lib.rs — extended: backend + kernels modules, MtlBackend re-export, is_mps_available now delegates to MTLDevice::new() on macOS, init_mps_backend now delegates to init_mps_backend_metal() on macOS
- ferrotorch-mps/Cargo.toml — objc2-metal 0.3.2 + objc2-foundation 0.3.2 + objc2 0.6.4 added under [target.'cfg(target_os="macos")'.dependencies]
- tests/conformance_mps.rs — 6 kernel source presence tests (all platforms) + 10 cascade_skip live-MPS tests (#626)
- tests/conformance/_surface_inventory.toml — updated with 12 new items
- tests/conformance/_surface_exclusions.toml — MtlBackend + MtlBackend::new excluded with tracking_issue=#626

Verification:
- cargo build --workspace: PASS (0 errors, 2 pre-existing ferrotorch-core warnings)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-mps: 34 tests PASS (27 conformance + 5 unit + 1 surface coverage + 1 doctest)
- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets: 0 new warnings
- No CPU detour patterns in backend.rs (gpu_to_cpu .to_vec() is the correct end-pipeline readback)
- No stub residue (todo!/unimplemented!) in any hot path
- 18 follow-up issues filed (#941-#958) covering all ~70 remaining GpuBackend methods

Live Metal execution (Apple Silicon CI) deferred per Sprint A.1 cascade_skip pattern. Tests print diagnostics and return cleanly on WSL2 x86_64.
